name: SHORE BANCSHARES INC
summary: PART I OVERVIEW General Shore Bancshares, Inc. was incorporated under the laws of Maryland on March 15, 1996 and is the bank holding company for Shore United Bank, N.A,. Throughout this report, references to the Company, we, our, and us, and similar terms refer to the consolidated entity consisting of Shore Bancshares, Inc. and its subsidiaries. Shore Bancshares refers solely to the parent holding company, and the Bank refers solely to Shore Bancshares subsidiary bank, Shore United Bank, N.A. Sh...
